case_title: ALFREDO GARCIA ET AL VS. ALBERT FIORELLA

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FIORELLA, ALBERT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $65.00) SERVED JAN-21-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FIORELLA, ALBERT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GARCIA, ALFREDO GARCIA, JR, ARNULFO AS TO DEFENDANT FIORELLA, ALBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
